name: PER_CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES_V
query: SELECT B.CATEGORY_CODE as LOOKUP_CODE, T.NAME as MEANING, T.DESCRIPTION, B.ENABLED_FLAG, B.TAG, B.SUBJECT_TYPE_CODE, B.SUB_CATEGORY_ALLOWED, T.CREATED_BY, T.CREATION_DATE, T.LAST_UPDATED_BY, T.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, T.LAST_UPDATE_DATE FROM PER_CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES_TL T, PER_CHECKLIST_CATEGORIES_B B WHERE T.CHECKLIST_CATEGORY_ID = B.CHECKLIST_CATEGORY_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.CATEGORY_TYPE = 'CATEGORY'
